chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 489 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections 5 & 17. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA 2982/2017. 18.09.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali, advocate for respondent. This reference is pending since 2017 without any progress. Even today, the applicant remained unrepresented without any intimation or justification; therefore, in view of the judgment of Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Judge Judge Amjad
